hero_title_accent: Simplifying SAR and STR Drafting for VASPs
hero_subtitle: SFTY helps compliance teams reduce manual workload by structuring AI-supported SAR drafting within a connected workflow that preserves audit-ready evidence and case history.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk

trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling

problem_title: Manual SAR drafting slows compliance workflows
problem_description: Compliance teams spend excessive time manually preparing suspicious activity and transaction reports, leading to slower review cycles and higher workloads. This fragmentation reduces audit readiness and weakens traceability across alert triage, case handling, and regulatory reporting processes.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY links alerts, provider checks, reviewer actions and SAR drafting into unified case workflows that streamline suspicious activity review and generate audit-ready evidence for compliance teams.
workflow_title: From alerts to SAR case preparation
workflow_description: SFTY channels AML alerts through triage, AI-assisted drafting, case documentation and review to produce structured SAR evidence and reporting packages efficiently.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit

why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a structured compliance layer that connects KYC, KYT, Travel Rule, and screening outputs into connected workflows for digital asset compliance teams at VASPs.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support SAR drafting workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY uses AI-assisted review to help draft SAR narratives, organize case data and streamline alert triage while supporting human oversight remains central to decision-making.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready SAR evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and supporting evidence in audit-ready packages to support internal review, regulatory inspections and compliant reporting workflows.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects multiple existing compliance providers, orchestrating their outputs into one controlled workflow without requiring replacement of current systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above providers and structures their data into workflows and reports; it does not replace KYC, KYT, Travel Rule or screening platforms.
final_title: Structure SAR and STR drafting workflows with SFTY
final_description: Explore how SFTY supports AI-assisted SAR drafting, audit-ready evidence, case linkage and streamlined AML compliance operations.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
